mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu_item (merchant_id, category_id, name, price, image, description, stock, sort_order, sell_count, max_purchase_per_user, status) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{stock}, #{sortOrder}, #{sellCount}, #{maxPurchasePerUser}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE menu_item
name = #{name}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, category_id = #{categoryId}, stock = #{stock}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, sell_count = #{sellCount}, max_purchase_per_user = #{maxPurchasePerUser},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE menu_item SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menu_item WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM menu_item WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
